_comment: Auto-research subscriptions. Each query is run by scripts/auto-research.mjs. Findings land in docs/research/findings/<id>/<timestamp>.md. Schedule is descriptive only — actual cron wiring is deferred until VPS is up (see project_vps_deployment memory). Run manually with: node scripts/auto-research.mjs --once --query <id>

queries.topic: Design system updates and patterns this week
queries.prompt: Summarize 3-5 notable design-system updates, articles, or open-source releases from the past 7 days. Focus on token strategy, component API design, and Figma↔code parity. Cite sources.

queries.topic: Agentic AI build loop patterns and frameworks
queries.prompt: Identify recent (last 14 days) work on autonomous agent loops, multi-agent dispatch patterns, and orchestration frameworks. Highlight any drop-in tools that could replace bespoke watchdog scripts. Be concrete with names + links.

Find 3-5 patterns or case studies from the past 30 days about solo-founder design/dev agencies using automation to scale without hiring. Bias toward client-onboarding, billing, and asset-pipeline automation. Note tooling specifics.
